## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress and next steps for GrowthX's engagement with Zapier on template optimization project.](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Team aligned on moving forward with GrowthX engagement; ready for SoW and contract review](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
  - [Initial engagement: 40K strategy sprint (10 weeks), followed by 15K/month for 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Key questions on quantity expectations and review process to be addressed by Janine (Zapier)](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Contract to include both Phase 1 (strategy) and Phase 2 (execution), with opt-out option](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)

## Topics

### Project Scope and Progress

  - [GrowthX team made significant progress in scoping best first step](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Focus: Refreshing/remixing 500k-600k existing templates for SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [Zapier team (Danny, Danielle) supportive of moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
  - [Next steps: Review SoW, finalize engagement details](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)

### Quantity and Timeline Expectations

  - [Need to clarify Zapier's expectations on quantity and timeline](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Tyler to ask Janine in Slack for specifics on:](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
      - [Human review process for templates](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
      - [Monthly refresh targets for 500k-600k templates](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Review process significantly impacts quantity output](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)

### Pricing and Budget

  - [Strategy sprint (Phase 1): 40K for 10 weeks (incl. holiday buffer)](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Execution phase (Phase 2): 12 months, options at 15K/mo or 30K/mo](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Kaveh suggests starting at 15K/mo, with potential to increase later](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
  - [Tyler notes limited signals during strategy sprint due to setup focus](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)

### Contract and Procurement Process

  - [Contract to include both Phase 1 and Phase 2 (full 12-month engagement)](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Opt-out option available at end of Phase 1](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Kaveh to check 2025 budget availability and 2026 budget planning](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Zapier uses Zip for procurement; legal team to review contract](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Limited vendor onboarding process; mainly payment info needed](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)

### Timeline and Next Steps

  - [Tyler to send contract draft (without pricing) to Kaveh by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Kaveh to initiate legal review and procurement process](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Awaiting Janine's responses on quantity/review process to finalize SoW](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to send contract draft (sans pricing) to Kaveh by Monday morning](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Kaveh to ping Janine for responses on quantity/review process questions](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Kaveh to initiate legal review and procurement process via Zip](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Tyler to prepare for providing payment information once prompted](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [Both parties to monitor Slack for Janine's responses to finalize SoW details](https://fathom.video/share/9yvNssW6osxekmgAXX6z2ogCwMbtpJbu?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
